export default function MedicineCard({ medicine, onAddToCart, onEdit, onDelete }) { const imageSrc = medicine.image_url || `https://picsum.photos/seed/medicine-${medicine.id}/420/260`; const hasCoords = medicine.shop_latitude != null && medicine.shop_longitude != null; const lat = hasCoords ? Number(medicine.shop_latitude).toFixed(5) : null; const lng = hasCoords ? Number(medicine.shop_longitude).toFixed(5) : null; const mapsUrl = hasCoords ? `https://www.google.com/maps?q=${encodeURIComponent(`${medicine.shop_latitude},${medicine.shop_longitude}`)}` : null; return (
{medicine.in_stock ? "In Stock" : "Out of Stock"}
{medicine.in_stock &&
}

{medicine.name}

Shop: {medicine.shop_name || "Medical Shop"}
Area: {medicine.shop_area || "Area not available"}
Location: {medicine.shop_area && medicine.shop_state ? `${medicine.shop_area}, ${medicine.shop_state}` : medicine.shop_state || medicine.shop_area || "Location not available"}
Shop Coords: {hasCoords ? `${lat}, ${lng}` : "Coordinates not available"}
{mapsUrl && (
Map: Open map
)}
State: {medicine.shop_state || "State not available"}
{typeof medicine.distanceKm === "number" && (
Distance: {medicine.distanceKm.toFixed(2)} km
)}
Rate: {medicine.shop_rating ? `${Number(medicine.shop_rating).toFixed(1)} / 5` : "N/A"}
Price: ₹ {medicine.price}
Availability: {medicine.in_stock ? "✓ Available" : "✗ Out of Stock"}
{onAddToCart && ( )} {onEdit && ( )} {onDelete && ( )}
); }
